name: Dragon ball universal RPG
description: Welcome to Dragon Ball Universal RPG, an exhilarating universe of adventures where you become a legendary warrior. Explore iconic landscapes, challenge formidable foes, and hone your skills to reach new levels of power. Embark on this epic journey where every choice shapes your destiny, and every battle is an opportunity to prove your strength. Get ready to experience the Dragon Ball saga in a unique way, where the story unfolds with your participation. The fate of the universe is in your hands—train, fight, and become the hero the world needs.
creator: Emanuelvip
